name: Pesto Carbonara
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, fry bacon until lightly browned; drain and set aside.
2. Place basil and garlic in a food processor or blender and process until finely minced.
3. Mix the half and half with the beaten eggs in a large bowl.
4. Add the cooked bacon, basil mixture, and cheese to the egg mixture.
5. Cook pasta according to package directions. Drain and add to the egg mixture.
6. Cover and let stand for 2 to 3 minutes. Uncover and toss to coat the pasta with the sauce.
7. Serve immediately. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
